home.title: Colony management
home.tagline: Making life better for our feline friends

auth.noAccount: No account? Ask an administrator to invite you.
auth.inviteNotAvailableSignedIn: There’s no pending invite for your account. If you already joined, just open the app.

auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.resetLinkSent: If that email exists, we’ve sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox.

invite.subject: You’re invited to {orgName}
invite.heading: Welcome to {orgName} 🐾
invite.body: You’ve been invited to help look after the cats at {orgName} as {role}. Tap the button below to choose a password and join.

digest.subject: {orgName}: {count} alerts to review
digest.heading: Your daily summary for {orgName}
digest.summary: There are {count} alerts waiting for you to review.
digest.footer: You’re receiving this because you help manage colonies at {orgName}. Open the app to see the full details and mark alerts as read.

today.title: Today
today.emptyManagerBody: When a colony is added to this organisation, it'll show up here for the day.
today.emptyFeederTitle: No feeds assigned to you today
today.emptyFeederBody: When a caretaker schedules you to feed a colony, it'll appear here.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.allClearTitle: All clear across {count, plural, one {# colony} other {# colonies}} today
dashboard.allClearBody: Every feed is on track, no urgent incidents, and no cats need review. Nothing needs you right now.
dashboard.feedsEmptyBody: When a colony is added to this organisation, it'll show up here for the day.
dashboard.missedEmptyBody: No colony has slipped past its feeding window today.
dashboard.urgentEmptyBody: Urgent reports from feeders will land here for immediate triage.
dashboard.newCatsEmptyBody: When a feeder reports a new cat, it'll appear here for review.
dashboard.concernEmptyBody: Cats that go unseen past the threshold will be flagged here.

feed.title: Feeding update
feed.noCatsYet: No cats in this colony yet.
feed.submitFailed: Could not save the feeding update. Please try again.

colonies.title: Colonies
colonies.emptyBody: A colony is a place you feed — a street, a yard, a car park.
colonies.name: Name
colonies.catsEmptyBody: Add the cats you see here so feeders can mark them each visit.
colonies.noOpenIncidents: No open incidents for this colony.
colonies.noFeedingUpdatesBody: Feeding updates recorded here will show the latest visits.
colonies.noIncidentsBody: Incidents reported for this colony will appear here.
colonies.scheduleEmptyBody: Assign feeders to this colony so it shows up on their Today list.
colonies.archiveHint: Hides it from the list. Data is kept (soft delete) and can be restored later.
colonies.archiveConfirm: Archive this colony? It will be hidden from lists.

toast.catReported: ✓ Cat reported. A caretaker will review it.
toast.incidentReportedUrgent: ✓ Incident reported. Flagged as urgent for caretakers.
toast.catConfirmed: ✓ Cat confirmed and added to the colony.
toast.catRejected: Reported cat rejected and removed from the colony.
toast.photoFailed: The photo didn’t attach, but your report was saved.

cats.addLede: Give the cat a name, or a short description if it has no name yet — at least one. Everything else is optional.
cats.editLede: Keep a name, or a short description if it has no name yet — at least one. Everything else is optional; fill in what you know.
cats.descriptionPlaceholderManager: e.g. ginger tom by the bins
cats.name: Name
cats.reportLede: Spotted a cat that isn’t on the list? Give it a name or a quick description — that’s all you need. A caretaker will review it.
cats.idErrorAlert: Add a name or a short description so the cat can be identified.
cats.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. black & white by the wall
cats.imageTooLarge: That image is too large (max 25 MB).
cats.submitFailed: Could not save the cat. Please try again.
cats.rejectConfirm: Reject this reported cat? It will be removed from the colony. You can’t undo this.
cats.reviewConfirmHint: Confirm to add it to the colony, or reject if it’s a duplicate or mistake.
cats.reviewWaitHint: Waiting for a caretaker to review.
cats.toastReviewed: ✓ Marked as reviewed — no action needed for now.
cats.toastMissing: ✓ Marked missing. You can mark it found if it returns.
cats.toastFound: ✓ Marked found and back to active.
cats.notePlaceholder: Add a short note for the team
cats.markMissingConfirm: Mark this cat as missing? It moves out of the active list. This is reversible — you can mark it found if it returns.
cats.caretakerWillReview: A caretaker will review this cat.
cats.missingHint: This cat is marked missing. If it’s been seen again, mark it found to return it to the active list.
cats.markFoundConfirm: Mark this cat as found? It returns to the active list.
cats.noOtherColonies: There are no other colonies to move this cat to yet.
cats.noSightingsBody: Feeders’ updates for this cat will appear here, newest first.
cats.noStatusChangesBody: When this cat is confirmed or marked missing, the change shows here.

schedules.addSubtitle: Assign a feeder to this colony

schedules.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Dry food in the blue bowl

invite.helper: They'll be invited as a feeder. You can assign them to a schedule once they accept the invitation.
invite.helperEmpty: They'll be invited as a feeder. You can create this schedule once they accept the invitation.
invite.successNormal: Invitation sent to {email}. They'll appear as a feeder once they accept. No schedule was created yet.
invite.successEmpty: Invitation sent to {email}. The schedule can't be created until someone accepts and becomes a feeder.
invite.waiting: Waiting on {email} to accept. No assignable feeder yet.
invite.adminNote: Only admins can invite. Caretakers ask an admin to add someone.
invite.emptyWarning: No feeders or caretakers to assign yet. Invite a volunteer below to get started — you can create the schedule once they accept.

incidents.allClearBody: No open incidents across your colonies. New reports from feeders will land here.
incidents.noOneYet: No one is on this yet.
incidents.reopenHint: Reopen sends it back to the queue if something recurs. The resolution note stays in the history.

form.chooseType: Choose what’s happening before you report.
form.urgencyHint: Defaults to your org’s ‘Not urgent’. Tap Urgent to flag it for caretakers.
form.imageTooLarge: That image is too large (max 25 MB).
form.submitFailed: Could not save the incident. Please try again.

resolve.resolutionPlaceholder: How was this resolved? (recorded in the colony's history)
resolve.noteHint: A note is required so the colony’s history records how it was solved.

invite.adminNote: Admins have full access to this organisation — they can manage every colony, member and setting, and invite or remove other admins.

members.invitedEmailed: We’ve emailed them an invite link.
members.invitedCopyLink: Email isn’t set up yet — copy their invite link below and send it.
members.cantChangeOwnRole: · 🔒 you can’t change your own role
members.eraseConfirm: Permanently delete the account for {email}? This cannot be undone. It removes them from every organisation, and their past activity will be anonymised.
members.invitesHint: Invitees are emailed a link automatically (once email is set up). You can also copy the link to send it yourself, or resend the email. They set a password and join.
members.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the organisation?
members.demoteConfirm: Change {email} from {from} to {to}? They’ll lose {from} access immediately.
members.lastAdminHint: Only active admin — promote another member to admin first.
members.emptyBody: Invite caretakers and feeders to help manage your colonies.
members.inviteCopyToast: Invite created for {email}. Copy the link to share it.
members.inviteToast: Invite created. Share the link with them.

org.title: Organisation
org.name: Name
org.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Registered charity no., main contact, anything the team should know.
org.timezoneHint: Used to decide what counts as “today” for feeds, schedules and missed-feed alerts. Currently {time} there.

alertSettings.title: Alert thresholds
alertSettings.subtitle: Control when the app flags a problem. Applies to your whole organisation.
alertSettings.notSeenLabel: Days before a cat is flagged “not seen”
alertSettings.notSeenHint: A cat is flagged for review after this many days with no sighting. Between 1 and 60.
alertSettings.repeatedLabel: Misses in a row before “repeated not-seen”
alertSettings.repeatedHint: How many feeding visits in a row a cat can be missed before it’s escalated. Between 1 and 10.
alertSettings.missedHint: A feed is marked missed this many hours after its window closes with no update. Between 1 and 72.

errors.chooseIncidentType: Choose what's happening before you report.
errors.noUrgencyConfigured: This organisation has no urgency levels configured yet.
errors.addNameOrDescription: Add a name or a short description so the cat can be identified.
errors.catNotAwaitingReview: This cat isn’t awaiting review anymore.

errors.cantDeactivateLastAdmin: You can’t deactivate the last admin.

errors.cannotEraseLastAdmin: You can’t delete the last admin — promote another member to admin first.
errors.chooseFeeder: Choose a feeder for this colony.
errors.pickOneOffDate: Pick a date to save this one-off feed.
errors.alertNotSeenRange: Days before a cat is “not seen” must be a whole number between 1 and 60.
errors.alertRepeatedRange: Misses in a row must be a whole number between 1 and 10.
errors.alertMissedRange: Hours after the feeding window must be a whole number between 1 and 72.
errors.alertSettingsNoLongerExist: Those alert settings could not be saved.

offline.pending: {count, plural, one {# waiting to sync} other {# waiting to sync}}
offline.failed: {count, plural, one {# didn’t save} other {# didn’t save}}
offline.emptyBody: Nothing is waiting to sync — every update has been saved.
offline.savedWillSync: Saved on this device — it’ll sync when you’re back online.
offline.failedAuth: Couldn’t save — sign in again, then retry.
offline.failedValidation: Couldn’t save — this update was rejected.
offline.pendingNetwork: Waiting for a connection to sync.

help.title: Help & quick start
help.intro: Welcome! Here’s everything you need to start helping our colonies — no training required. It only takes a minute to read.

questions.heading: What this app helps you answer every day
questions.newMissing: Are there new or missing cats?

feeding.heading: Record a feeding update (about 30 seconds)
feeding.intro: This is the one thing to do on every visit. Quick and simple:
feeding.step1: Open the colony you’re visiting from Colonies.
feeding.step3: For each cat, tap Seen, Not seen, or Concern.
feeding.offline: No signal? No problem. Your update is saved on your phone and syncs automatically once you’re back online.

newCat.heading: Report a new cat
newCat.body: Spotted a cat you don’t recognise? Add it from the colony’s page. Fill in only what you know — a name, a colour, anything. Incomplete is fine; you’re never blocked for a missing field. A photo helps but is optional.

incident.heading: Report an incident
incident.body: Something wrong? Report it from the colony — choose the type and add a short note or photo.
incident.urgent: Poisoning, an injured cat, a dog danger, or a threat from a person. These send an immediate alert to the caretakers.
incident.notUrgent: Everything else — it appears on the caretaker’s dashboard for review.

roles.heading: Who does what
roles.admin: Manages the whole organisation and its settings.
roles.caretaker: Looks after colonies, reviews reports, and closes incidents.
roles.feeder: Visits colonies and sends field updates — the heart of the work.

language.heading: Your language & working offline
language.languageBody: Prefer English or Português? Switch any time using the language toggle in the menu — the whole app changes instantly.
language.offlineBody: The app works without a signal in the field. Anything you save is kept on your phone and syncs the moment you’re back online.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.intro: Tell us what’s broken or what would help. Goes to the SCoT app team.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: What happened? What did you expect?
feedback.autoContext: We’ll automatically attach the page you’re on, the app version and your device — so you don’t have to describe it.
feedback.privacy: Only the SCoT app team can see this. Please don’t include personal details about other people.
feedback.successBody: The SCoT app team will take a look.
feedback.errorEmpty: Please add a short message before sending.
feedback.errorUpload: Couldn’t attach the screenshot. You can still send your message, or try another image.
feedback.errorSubmit: Couldn’t send your feedback. Please try again.

inbox.title: Feedback inbox
inbox.intro: Reports submitted by your team during testing.
inbox.backAria: Send feedback — back to the feedback form
inbox.count: {count, plural, one {# report} other {# reports}} · newest first
inbox.emptyBody: Submissions from your team will appear here.
inbox.viewInboxSub: See what your team has reported

resolve.notePlaceholder: Add an optional note for the reporter…
resolve.noteHint: Optional — resolve works with it empty. The reporter is notified in-app.
